settings.faq_q3: Is this good for sensitive skin?
settings.faq_a3: Our grass-fed tallow balm is naturally gentle and non-comedogenic.

settings.title: Nourish Your Hide
settings.subtitle: No hype. No filler. Just real ingredients that actually work — for you, your family, and your skin.

settings.heading: Always Grass-Fed & Finished
settings.body: No shortcuts. Our tallow is 100% grass-fed, grass-finished, and sourced from trusted farms.

settings.heading: Actually Affordable
settings.body: Tired of $45 jars? Us too. We kept it real — real pricing, no gimmicks or markups.

settings.heading: Made in the USA
settings.body: Poured, packed, and shipped right here — supporting small farms and suppliers across the U.S.

settings.heading: Built by Real People
settings.body: We started Hide out of frustration with overpriced, overcomplicated “natural” skincare. So we fixed it.

settings.heading: No Fluff. No Fillers.
settings.body: Always pure, always powerful — priced right, with nothing extra.

settings.title: Why Hide Tallow?
settings.subtitle: A different kind of skincare — made for real people, priced for real life.
